summary: A vertical produced clip with burned-in word captions showing officers in tactical vests interacting with members of the public. One sampled frame shows an officer holding the lid of a red-and-black storage bin on a cart while a person pushes it; the caption reads 'DIFFERENT STORY'. Another frame shows an officer shaking hands with a woman in front of a refrigerated store display, with the caption 'OF WHAT'.

script.scene: An officer in a tactical vest holds the lid of a red storage bin on a wheeled cart that a person is pushing; caption 'DIFFERENT STORY'.
An officer shakes hands with a woman in front of a refrigerated display in a store; caption 'OF WHAT'.
